Please propose suitable interest for our following exclusive period vessel:
 
MV Sheng Feng Hai (56,879 dwt / 2011 blt) - open Chittagong o/a 05-08 Dec iagw wp
 
- BOD : Abt 450-475 Mts VLSFO / abt 80-85 LSMGO
- Last ports: Chittagong (Current) / Cochin / Salalah / Mundra / Las Palmas / Jorf Lasfar
- Last 3 cargoes: Limestone (Current) / Fertilizer (DAP + TSP) / Steel Products / Dry-Docked
 
- RIGHTSHIP 4 STARS
- Looking for Biz W/i PG-Japan Range - Collecting rated biz 
 
-NO COASTAL TRADING
